name: WLF_ROLE_ALIGNMENT_DN
description: This is a denormalized table. It stores all the information related to capability guide skills assigned to a person.

columns.Name: ROLE_ALIGNMENT_DN_ID
columns.Comments: Primary Key of the table. System generated.

columns.Name: SKILL
columns.Comments: Name of the assigned capability guide skill.

columns.Name: CONTENT_ITEM_ID
columns.Comments: Foreign Key to HRT_CONTENT_ITEMS_B

columns.Name: PERSON_ID
columns.Comments: Foreign Key to PER_ALL_PEOPLE_F.

columns.Name: ASSIGNMENT_ID
columns.Comments: ASSIGNMENT_ID of the skill assignee and Foreign Key to PER_MANAGER_HRCHY_CF.

columns.Name: PROFILE_ID
columns.Comments: PROFILE_ID of the assigned skill.

columns.Name: ACHIEVED_FLAG
columns.Comments: To identified  whether assigned skill is achieved by person or not.

columns.Name: REQUIRED_LEVEL
columns.Comments: The required level set by assigner.

columns.Name: ACHIEVED_LEVEL
columns.Comments: Level that person has achieved for assigned skill.

columns.Name: ASSIGNED_BY
columns.Comments: ID of the person who assigned the skill.

columns.Name: ASSIGNED_DATE
columns.Comments: Date on which skill is assigned.

columns.Name: ROLE_GUIDE_ID
columns.Comments: Identifier of Role Guide and Foreign Key to WLF_GRW_GUIDES_F.

columns.Name: CAPABILITY_GUIDE_ID
columns.Comments: Identifier of Capability Guide and Foreign Key to WLF_GRW_GUIDES_F.

columns.Name: PERSON_NAME_GLOBAL_DISP_NAME
columns.Comments: Global - Derived denormalized name formatted for on-screen display. Formatting depends on the Legislation Code, expect First Name as first component in this format.

columns.Name: PERSON_NAME_GLOBAL_LIST_NAME
columns.Comments: Global - Constructed version of a person's name, intended for use in an alphabetically-ordered list. The value may naturally differ depending on the  Legislation Code.Expect the Last Name as the first component in this format in most cases.

columns.Name: PERSON_NAME_LOCAL_DISP_NAME
columns.Comments: Local - Derived denormalized name formatted for on-screen display. Formatting depends on the Legislation Code, expect First Name as first component in this format.

columns.Name: PERSON_NAME_LOCAL_LIST_NAME
columns.Comments: Local - Constructed version of a person's name, intended for use in an alphabetically-ordered list. The value may naturally differ depending on the  Legislation Code.Expect the Last Name as the first component in this format in most cases.

columns.Name: OBJECT_VERSION_NUMBER
columns.Comments: Used to implement optimistic locking. This number is incremented every time that the row is updated. The number is compared at the start and end of a transaction to detect whether another session has updated the row since it was queried.

columns.Name: CREATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who created the row.

columns.Name: CREATION_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the creation of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the last update of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the session login associated to the user who last updated the row.
